content:
Hi, I updated wasmtime targets on Godbolt (compiler-explorer):
https://godbolt.org/z/616EM63Mq

I could also add a daily "dev" (https://github.com/bytecodealliance/wasmtime/releases/tag/dev) builds for frontend if anyone’s interested, but that’s not a trivial and required custom scripting for godbolt's infra
